creator: freebsd@dns.company
text:
Created attachment 241006
h2o

Ahead of de EoL date of OpenSSL 1.1.1 (9/11), I'm trying openssl-devel.

When installing dnsdist I encounter a few minor problems.
USES=localbase missing in www/h2o/Makefile being one.

So I created attached patch, which effectively only adds that.
However, when testing with portclippy I reordered things untill it was happy.

All fine in portlint, portfmt, portclippy and poudriere.
